‘Fox News’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: The Fox News Channel (FNC), often referred to as Fox News, is an American multinational conservative news and political commentary television channel and website based in New York City.

title: ‘Fresh and Fit Podcast’ starts
subtitle: Men's-right podcast
fact: The Fresh and Fit Podcast is a show hosted by Sudanese American blogger Amrou Fudl, known online by the pseudonym Myron Gaines, and Barbadian American Walter Weekes, who goes by the moniker "FreshPrinceCEO".

title: ‘CNN’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: The Cable News Network (CNN) is an American multinational news media company and the flagship namesake property of CNN Worldwide, a division of Warner Bros.

title: ‘The Guardian’ launches
subtitle: Newspaper
fact: The Guardian is a British daily newspaper.

title: ‘Nickelodeon’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: Nickelodeon is an American pay television channel and the flagship property of Nickelodeon Group, a sub-division of the Paramount Media Networks division of Paramount Skydance.

title: ‘Al Arabiya’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: Al Arabiya is a Saudi Arabian state-owned international Arabic-language television news channel.

title: ‘Cartoon Network’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: Cartoon Network (CN) is an American cable television channel operated by the Global Linear Networks division of Warner Bros.

title: ‘BBC News’ launches
subtitle: Newspaper
fact: BBC News is an operational business division of the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) responsible for the gathering and broadcasting of news and current affairs in the UK and around the world.

title: ‘Daily Mail’ launches
subtitle: Newspaper
fact: The Daily Mail, often known simply as the Mail, is a British daily middle-market tabloid conservative newspaper founded in 1896 and published in London.

title: ‘Call Her Daddy’ starts
subtitle: Sex advice and comedy podcast
fact: Call Her Daddy is an advice and comedy podcast created by Alex Cooper and Sofia Franklyn in 2018.

title: ‘Channel 4’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: Channel 4 is a British free-to-air public broadcast television channel owned and operated by Channel Four Television Corporation.

title: ‘France 24’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: France 24 is a French state-owned publicly funded international news television network based in Paris.

title: ‘HBO’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: Home Box Office (HBO) is an American premium television network and service, which is the flagship property of namesake parent Home Box Office, Inc., a subsidiary of Warner Bros.

title: ‘The Washington Post’ launches
subtitle: Newspaper
fact: The Washington Post is an American daily newspaper published in Washington, D.C.

title: ‘Boston Globe’ launches
subtitle: Newspaper
fact: The Boston Globe, also known locally as the Globe, is an American daily newspaper founded and based in Boston, Massachusetts.

title: ‘The Times of India’ launches
subtitle: Newspaper
fact: The Times of India (TOI) is an Indian English-language daily news and digital news media.

title: ‘Disney Channel’ launches
subtitle: TV channel
fact: Disney Channel is an American pay television channel that serves as the flagship property of Disney Branded Television, a unit of the Disney Entertainment business segment of the Walt Disney Company.

title: ‘The Daily Telegraph’ launches
subtitle: Newspaper
fact: The Daily Telegraph, known online and elsewhere as The Telegraph, is a British daily broadsheet conservative newspaper published in London by Telegraph Media Group and distributed in the United Kingdom and internationally.
